name: wiki-badge-tag
description: Dual-purpose chip: (1) article quality grade (Featured/Good/A/B/C/Stub), (2) category tag links. Inline, pill-shaped. Used by wiki-article-header (quality badge) and wiki-article-footer (category tags).
html: {{grade-label}} {{label}}

variants.name: quality-grade
variants.description: Non-interactive <span> with grade color and aria-label.

aria: Quality badge: non-interactive <span> with aria-label containing the full grade name ('Article quality: Featured article'). Abbreviated display text (e.g., 'FA') is acceptable visually since aria-label supplies the full name. Category tag: standard <a href>; no additional ARIA needed.
open_questions: Featured article badge uses amber/gold (#f5cd7a on white) — verify contrast in light mode. In dark mode the badge background is on a dark surface; WCAG agent confirmed #f5cd7a passes on dark. Light-mode contrast needs separate check for this specific combination.
